name: getnote
description: Create and manage notes via Get笔记 Open API. Supports text notes, image notes, link notes, knowledge bases, and querying meeting/audio notes with AI summaries.
author: Get笔记 <dev@biji.com>

env.name: GETNOTE_API_KEY
env.description: Get笔记 API Key (格式: gk_live_xxx)

env.name: GETNOTE_CLIENT_ID
env.description: Get笔记 Client ID (格式: cli_xxx)
